flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at San Francisco State University rose 45% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $5.0k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at San Francisco State University rose 12% between 2007 and 2010 ($10.4k → $11.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at San Francisco State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at San Francisco State University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (24.1% → 28.4%).
